news.label: News Card
news.notificationText: A potentially manipulated post has been reported for review.

liveCheck.label: Live Check
liveCheck.notificationText: This viral post needs an immediate visual inspection.

perspective.label: Perspective Shift
perspective.notificationText: The manipulation was detected. Identify the intended effect.

realityDefense.label: Reality Defense
realityDefense.notificationText: Develop a new agency rule to prevent this error in future.
